select.value:
Select A.MEASURE_DT,A.EMP_ID,A.EMP_NM,A.EMP_TYPE_ID,B.RECOMMEND_TYPE_NM, A.CCY_ID,C.NM AS CCY_NM ,A.ORG_ID,D.ORG_NM AS ORG_NM,A.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,E.BRANCH_ORG_NM AS BRANCH_ORG_NM
,COALESCE(M_FNC_PROD_BONUS, 0) AS M_FNC_PROD_BONUS ,COALESCE(M_IND_EBANK_BONUS, 0) AS M_IND_EBANK_BONUS ,COALESCE(M_CORP_EBANK_BONUS, 0) AS M_CORP_EBANK_BONUS ,COALESCE(M_MOBILE_BANK_BONUS, 0) AS M_MOBILE_BANK_BONUS ,COALESCE(M_THIRD_PARTY_CUSTODY_BONUS, 0) AS M_THIRD_PARTY_CUSTODY_BONUS ,COALESCE(M_FUND_BONUS, 0) AS M_FUND_BONUS ,COALESCE(M_INSURANCE_BONUS, 0) AS M_INSURANCE_BONUS ,COALESCE(M_CREDIT_CARD_BONUS, 0) AS M_CREDIT_CARD_BONUS ,COALESCE(M_FNC_PROD_BONUS, 0) +COALESCE(M_IND_EBANK_BONUS, 0) +COALESCE(M_CORP_EBANK_BONUS, 0) +COALESCE(M_MOBILE_BANK_BONUS, 0) + COALESCE(M_THIRD_PARTY_CUSTODY_BONUS, 0) + COALESCE(M_FUND_BONUS, 0) + COALESCE(M_INSURANCE_BONUS, 0) + COALESCE(M_CREDIT_CARD_BONUS, 0) AS SUM1 ,COALESCE(Q_FNC_PROD_BONUS, 0) AS Q_FNC_PROD_BONUS ,COALESCE(Q_IND_EBANK_BONUS, 0) AS Q_IND_EBANK_BONUS ,COALESCE(Q_CORP_EBANK_BONUS, 0) AS Q_CORP_EBANK_BONUS ,COALESCE(Q_MOBILE_BANK_BONUS, 0) AS Q_MOBILE_BANK_BONUS ,COALESCE(Q_THIRD_PARTY_CUSTODY_BONUS, 0) AS Q_THIRD_PARTY_CUSTODY_BONUS ,COALESCE(Q_FUND_BONUS, 0) AS Q_FUND_BONUS ,COALESCE(Q_INSURANCE_BONUS, 0) AS Q_INSURANCE_BONUS ,COALESCE(Q_CREDIT_CARD_BONUS, 0) AS Q_CREDIT_CARD_BONUS ,COALESCE(Q_FNC_PROD_BONUS, 0) +COALESCE(Q_IND_EBANK_BONUS, 0) +COALESCE(Q_CORP_EBANK_BONUS, 0) +COALESCE(Q_MOBILE_BANK_BONUS, 0) +COALESCE(Q_THIRD_PARTY_CUSTODY_BONUS, 0) +COALESCE(Q_FUND_BONUS, 0) +COALESCE(Q_INSURANCE_BONUS, 0) +COALESCE(Q_CREDIT_CARD_BONUS, 0) AS SUM2 ,COALESCE(Y_FNC_PROD_BONUS, 0) AS Y_FNC_PROD_BONUS ,COALESCE(Y_IND_EBANK_BONUS, 0) AS Y_IND_EBANK_BONUS ,COALESCE(Y_CORP_EBANK_BONUS, 0) AS Y_CORP_EBANK_BONUS ,COALESCE(Y_MOBILE_BANK_BONUS, 0) AS Y_MOBILE_BANK_BONUS ,COALESCE(Y_THIRD_PARTY_CUSTODY_BONUS, 0) AS Y_THIRD_PARTY_CUSTODY_BONUS ,COALESCE(Y_FUND_BONUS, 0) AS Y_FUND_BONUS ,COALESCE(Y_INSURANCE_BONUS, 0) AS Y_INSURANCE_BONUS ,COALESCE(Y_CREDIT_CARD_BONUS,0) AS Y_CREDIT_CARD_BONUS ,COALESCE(Y_FNC_PROD_BONUS, 0) +COALESCE(Y_IND_EBANK_BONUS, 0) +COALESCE(Y_CORP_EBANK_BONUS, 0) +COALESCE(Y_MOBILE_BANK_BONUS, 0) +COALESCE(Y_THIRD_PARTY_CUSTODY_BONUS, 0) +COALESCE(Y_FUND_BONUS, 0) +COALESCE(Y_INSURANCE_BONUS, 0) +COALESCE(Y_CREDIT_CARD_BONUS, 0) AS SUM3 FROM IBS.T2_EMP_BONUS_SMY A LEFT JOIN IBS.T9_RECOMMEND_TYPE B ON A.EMP_TYPE_ID=B.RECOMMEND_TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN PUB.CL C ON A.CCY_ID=C.CL_ID LEFT JOIN IBS.T5_ORG D ON A.ORG_ID=D.ORG_ID AND D.ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' LEFT JOIN IBS.T5_ORG E ON A.BRANCH_ORG_ID=E.ORG_ID AND E.ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' where {#condition#} order by A.MEASURE_DT desc,A.M_FNC_PROD_BONUS desc

option.source: @{Select RECOMMEND_TYPE_ID AS EMP_TYPE_ID, RECOMMEND_TYPE_NM from IBS.T9_RECOMMEND_TYPE }
option.label: RECOMMEND_TYPE_NM
